title: Impact frames resource pack template
description: Template resource pack for modifying Impact Frames.
body: # Overview - This is a template resource pack for the mod "[Impact Frames](https://modrinth.com/mod/impact-frames-pvp)" - Downloading the files will give you`Template.zip`, which contains textures you can paint over, and sounds you can modify, replace or remove. - You can join the discord server to post your packs, and check out content made by other people. # Final notes * Join the discord server to be notified of updates, report bugs, or suggest new features.
